title: KitchenPerfected 260W Multi Chopper / 1 Speed Operation Plus Turbo Button / Stainless Steel Blades / Whisk Attachment / Plastic Bowl with Measuring Gauge / 500ml Capacity - Ivory White - E5416WI
features: 2 IN 1 WHISK OR CHOP: The Multichopper comes with a whisk attachment that is ideal for milkshakes or mixing liquids OR sharp stainless steel blades for chopping and dicing.
TURBO BUTTON: Hold down the turbo button to increase the blade speed for easier chopping of light ingredients and provides a pulse operation.
STAINLESS STEEL CHOPPING BLADES: the sharp twin blades easily cut and dice vegetables, fruit, meat or other ingredients.
500ML MIXING BOWL: Ingredients can be measured out using the measuring gauge on the side of the plastic mixing bowl for perfect portion sizes.
RUBBER BASE: The removable rubber base will ensure stability and support whilst using the chopper.
description: The KitchenPerfected 260W Multi Chopper is a small and convenient kitchen device that helps to prepare ingredients. It features sharp twin stainless steel chopping blades rapidly cuts through meat, vegtables, fruit, herbs, soft nuts etc in preperation from salads, baby food, minced meat etc. A whisk attachment is also included, this attaches onto the spindle of the chopping blades to smoothly and gently blend ingredients. This chopper has a 1 speed operation plus a turbo button for pulse operation, which provides two (2) speeds and varied chopping styles. The 500ml mixing bowl is dishwasher safe also has a measuring gauge on the side, which is perfect for perfectly measuring out and preparing ingredients, all whilst the removable rubber base keeps everything stable. Box Includes: 1 x KitchenPerfected 260W Multi Chopper 1x Milkshake Whisk Attachment 1x Instruction Manual
